name: Mutasi Barang - Filter Tipe, Filter Gudang, Filter Tanggal
description: Test laporan mutasi barang: filter tipe mutasi, filter gudang, filter tanggal. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Mutasi Barang menu in the sidebar
Mutasi Barang page is visible showing mutation log table
Select a mutation type from the Semua Tipe dropdown filter
Table is filtered showing only the selected mutation type
Select a warehouse from the Semua Gudang dropdown filter
